title: Fix analytics root-relative Base2026 404 links
evidence: 42 links to 39 unique 4xx targets; most non-author samples are emitted by /knowledge/analytics.html
implementation_hint: Update analytics link generation to use /knowledge/ paths or correct relative paths for topics, sources, creators, and query routes
acceptance_criteria: No root /topics/ or root /index.html?source= links from analytics; Ahrefs 4xx samples from analytics clear

title: Fix /author/ 404 links
evidence: /author/ is the top 4xx target with 4 source pages
implementation_hint: Disable bad author archive links or redirect /author/ to /about/
acceptance_criteria: /author/ no longer appears as a 404 target

title: Eliminate mass /contact/ redirect links
implementation_hint: Choose canonical contact URL and update WordPress plus Base2026 navigation/footer/form links
acceptance_criteria: Links-to-redirect count for /contact/ is zero or explicitly justified

title: Add crawlable source archive or incoming-link graph
implementation_hint: Create paginated /knowledge/sources/ archive and/or static creator/topic source lists
acceptance_criteria: Every public source page has at least one crawlable internal incoming link

title: Clean duplicate query-state URL crawl paths
evidence: Largest duplicate content group has 2,664 URLs; /knowledge/ is an indexable duplicate sample
implementation_hint: Keep app query URLs for users but canonical/noindex or replace crawlable internal links with static URLs
acceptance_criteria: Indexable duplicate cluster is removed or deliberately canonicalized

title: Add shared OG and X/Twitter card templates
evidence: 1,304 incomplete Open Graph pages; 1,314 missing X/Twitter cards; 10 OG missing
implementation_hint: Generate complete social metadata for source, topic, creator, compare, API, and info pages
acceptance_criteria: Indexable pages include complete OG and Twitter fields

title: Fix rich-result validation errors
implementation_hint: Validate JSON-LD templates and remove invalid rich-result markup when data is insufficient
acceptance_criteria: Rich-result errors are zero or documented as intentionally non-rich schema

title: Remove non-canonical sitemap URL
evidence: Ahrefs reports 1 non-canonical page in sitemap
implementation_hint: Find exact URL and update sitemap generation to include only canonical indexable URLs
acceptance_criteria: Sitemap contains only canonical indexable URLs

title: Normalize title meta and H1 templates
evidence: 310 long titles; 138 long meta descriptions; 38 short meta descriptions; 1 missing meta; 1 missing H1
implementation_hint: Tune generated and WordPress title/meta/H1 templates after URL contracts are stable
acceptance_criteria: Indexable title/meta/H1 warnings are cleared or reduced to justified edge cases

title: Reduce links to noindex pages
evidence: 4,474 links to noindex targets, mostly topics and compare
implementation_hint: Decide which topic/compare pages are indexable vs utility-only and update links/canonicals
acceptance_criteria: No high-value public page is both heavily linked and noindex without a documented reason

title: Reduce internal uncrawled URL pressure
evidence: 1,174 internal URLs not crawled due monthly Ahrefs crawl limit
implementation_hint: Reduce duplicate/query crawl paths, then rerun Ahrefs with enough crawl credits
acceptance_criteria: Follow-up crawl completes without internal limit exhaustion

title: Optimize oversized Alex cutout asset
implementation_hint: Generate responsive WebP/AVIF or compressed PNG variants and update theme references
acceptance_criteria: Ahrefs image-size warning clears and visual QA still passes

title: Investigate oversized CSS warnings
evidence: Ahrefs reports 4 CSS file size warnings
implementation_hint: Audit loaded CSS, minify or split only where it is safe
acceptance_criteria: CSS warnings clear or are accepted with compression evidence

title: Submit IndexNow and GSC only after fixes
evidence: Ahrefs lists 1,314 pages to submit to IndexNow
implementation_hint: Wait until P0 and core P1 fixes are deployed and verified
acceptance_criteria: IndexNow/GSC submission list contains stable canonical URLs only
